headline: CONFIRMATION cycle. May 1 Pentagon official confirmation that Microsoft is among 8 firms cleared for classified AI deployment is in-window but corroborates pattern already scored last cycle. Apr 23 voluntary buyout of ~8,750 employees structurally distinct from forced layoffs (already assessed -1.4 below threshold last cycle). No new entity-specific structural events Apr 29-May 2. Composite remains 65.0 (-1.4 from published 66.4); sub-threshold; no proposal applied. Microsoft remains the highest-scoring Fortune 500 tech entity.
key_evidence: May 1 2026: Pentagon publicly confirmed Microsoft, AWS, Nvidia, Reflection AI in classified AI deployment cohort (corroborating, not new).
Apr 23 voluntary buyout for ~8,750 US employees (~7%) — structurally distinct from involuntary layoffs (already scored last cycle).
CEO public comments to laid-off workers continue to attract criticism (Futurism Apr 2026).
$145B FY capex for AI infrastructure context.

evidence.finding: Pentagon-Microsoft classified AI deployment deal confirmed publicly.
Voluntary buyout offered to ~7% of US employees (~8,750).

scoring_rationale.EMP: 3.4 (-0.1). CEO comments to laid-off workers reduce E1 Affective Resonance modestly.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 3.9 (-0.1). Voluntary buyout structure preserves AC1/AC2 better than forced layoff would.
scoring_rationale.BND: 3.7 (-0.1). Pentagon classified deal participation marginally weakens B3 Scope Clarity around military AI.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 3.7 (-0.1). Modest pressure on AB1 Harm Acknowledgment from CEO comments controversy.
scoring_rationale.INT: 2.9 (-0.1). I4 Values Alignment minor pressure from Pentagon participation; offset by transparency around buyout structure.

math_check.validator_check: -1.4 vs published, well within ceiling and below threshold

negativeSignals: Pentagon classified deal participation; CEO comments to laid-off workers; AI displacement context.
positiveSignals: Voluntary buyout structure (vs. forced layoff); $145B AI infrastructure investment; remains top-scored Fortune 500 tech entity.
sector_context: Microsoft's Pentagon participation parallels Google/AWS/Nvidia; Anthropic's exclusion remains contrastive. Tech-sector layoff context (92K+ YTD) puts buyout structure in favorable relative light.
open_actions_resolved: May 1 Pentagon confirmation captured as corroborating evidence
open_actions_carried: Monitor for buyout completion outcomes and any post-buyout employee feedback
